title: Probability
description: Calculating and reasoning about probabilities for single and combined events, including conditional probability, independence, and tree/Venn diagram methods.
objectives: Apply the basic rules of probability, including P(not A) = 1 - P(A)
Use the addition rule P(A or B) = P(A) + P(B) - P(A and B) and recognise mutually exclusive events
Test for and apply independence, P(A and B) = P(A) x P(B)
Calculate conditional probabilities using P(A|B) = P(A and B) / P(B)
Represent and solve combined-event problems using Venn diagrams and tree diagrams

lessons.title: Basic probability rules and the addition rule
Tree diagrams and Venn diagrams for combined events
